name: Shrimp and Tomoto in Shells
recipeIngredient: 28 ounces Canned tomatoes, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large frying pan over medium heat. Add the shrimp and garlic; season with salt and pepper, then cook for 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally.
2. Remove the shrimp from the pan and set aside.
3. In the same pan, add the chopped tomatoes and parsley. Season with additional salt, pepper, and fennel seed. Cook for 4-5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in the lemon juice and sugar. Return the shrimp to the pan, simmer for 1 minute, then spoon into shell pasta and serve with vegetables.
